title: Python EDHOC: VerifyKey.verify argument order
description:
File: python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py
Line: 342

PyNaCl VerifyKey.verify() expects (signed_message, signature) but the signature is already detached. The call should be verify_key.verify(signature + m_2) for combined format or use verify_detached. This may cause signature verification to fail or accept invalid signatures.

The nacl library verify() combines the message and signature, so the current call 'verify_key.verify(m_2, signature_2)' passes m_2 as the signed message and signature_2 as the second positional arg, which is not the correct API usage for detached signatures.
close_reason: Duplicate of project-LICHEN-ow1e.263 which covers the same issue with more security context
